title: Chronic Kidney Disease - Haemodialysis Dietetic Guideline
summary: This guideline provides recommendations for the management of chronic kidney disease in patients undergoing haemodialysis. It outlines the nutritional review process, including the frequency and criteria for referral, and emphasizes the use of multiple markers for nutritional assessment. The document also details the responsibilities of the renal multidisciplinary team in ensuring patients receive appropriate dietary advice.
